title: Brogy Accepts Dorry’s Honor
description: On pages 20–23, brogy accepts dorry’s honor as dorry and Brogy’s duel reaches a heartbreaking turning point as Baroque Works exploits the giants’ warrior pride.
scene: Brogy Accepts Dorry’s Honor. Dorry and Brogy’s duel reaches a heartbreaking turning point as Baroque Works exploits the giants’ warrior pride. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Ugh...

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: Mr. 5,

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Miss Valentine.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Snooze ![Nooze

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Hmph... no need to make such a scowling face, help yourself to some of this black tea.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: There is a most fortuitous opportunity for us on this island.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: An opportunity to make such an enormous sum of money that we need not fight over it.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I'm sure you've already seen what I'm talking about, haven't you?

dialogue.speaker: Miss Goldenweek
dialogue.text: Oppor- Tunity?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: Take a look at these wanted posters...!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: To be honest, even I was completely taken aback when I first saw it...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You have my sincerest thanks for giving me this chance to come to this island.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: These are wanted posters from a hundred years ago.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: There was once a group of giant pirates who pillaged town after town and terrified the entire world...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: They were called the warrior giant pirates and the two giants who led this fiendish pirate crew are on the very island we're on.

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Known as "Dorry the blue ogre" and "Brogy the red ogre," their names have long since faded away into mere legends of the past...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: However, they are still alive...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Furthermore, the Japanese

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: Not only that, the Bounties placed on their heads have not been called off either...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Presently, each one of their heads is worth 100 million bell...!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: In short, 200 million for the two of them!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: 200 million!?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: ...Finally, you grasp the gravity of our current circumstances.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: If we were to succeed in our mission and bring back 200 million bell on top of that,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Our promotions are sure to be guaranteed.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So that's why you placed the bomb in their rum...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Exactly. After all, we would stand no fighting chance were we to face them head on, you see?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: All you two need to do is follow my commands.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: With a little scheming,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Even an entire mountain can be levelled down to the ground, you know?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: Huh!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Ah...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It's that same volcano again...!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Gababababa! It's the signal for battle!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Ain't today quite exciting!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: You're going to fight? But what about the injuries you just received...?

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Ha, that goes for both him and me!

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on brogy accepts dorry’s honor. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
